revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a crisp 16-bit SNES-style pixel-art animated sprite sheet for a game asset.

Canvas and layout:
- Exact sheet size: 128x32 pixels.
- Grid: 1 row x 4 columns, each frame 32x32 pixels.
- Do not draw grid lines, separators, borders, frame numbers, labels, text, UI, signatures, or watermarks.
- Background must be solid #FF00FF chroma-key magenta in every empty pixel, with no gradients or texture.
- One creature per cell, centered, with clear solid magenta margin between the creature and every cell edge.

Style:
- Crisp low-resolution pixel art, no antialiasing blur.
- Bright cheerful mythical-Japan action RPG enemy style.
- Consistent palette, top-left light source, dark one-pixel outline where useful.
- Fine readable pixel clusters, clean silhouette.
- No detached fragments: no isolated pixel islands, seam slivers, dust specks, leftover effect residue, loose sparkles, or stray haze pixels separated from the creature.

Character:
- Original enemy only, no existing game character likeness.
- A cute-eerie but not scary kitsunebi fox-fire spirit tainted by impurity.
- Legless floating creature: a compact floating ball of pale blue-white spectral flame.
- Two small fox-ear flame tips on top.
- Simple glowing amber eyes.
- Thin wisps of dark purple haze clinging to the lower half only, connected to the body/flame mass and not detached.
- No mouth unless extremely minimal; no limbs; no body accessories.
- No samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, daisho swords, guns, modern objects, bird, companion creature, letter emblem, logo, or UI.

Animation identity lock:
- All four frames depict the exact same character at the exact same scale.
- Keep head/flame mass size, head-to-body ratio, body width, eye shape, and haze thickness identical in every frame except for slight pose/flicker deformation.
- Re-pose the same character; do not redraw into a new design.
- Standing/floating body height should match across frames except for controlled squash-and-stretch and flame-tip flicker.
- The hover position changes slightly inside each 32x32 cell while preserving margins.

Frame sequence, left to right:
1. Neutral hover: rounded pale blue-white flame ball, fox-ear tips upright, amber eyes centered, dark purple impurity haze hugging lower half.
2. Rises slightly: same character shifted slightly upward, flame tips lean right, body very slightly stretched upward.
3. Highest point: same character highest in the cell, flame flickers taller while the main body remains same scale and readable, ears/tips a little taller, eyes unchanged.
4. Settles down: same character lowered toward frame 1 position, flame tips lean left, slight squash while keeping silhouette consistent.

Negative constraints:
- No Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, Sakuna, or any logo/likeness.
- No dark gloomy palette, no horror mood.
- No grid lines, no text, no watermark.
- No detached pixels or separated effects.

Output only the single PNG sheet image described above.
